steps.title: Signal a new location
steps.content: The passage moves from Monument 3 at La Venta in Tabasco to another colossal head at San Lorenzo in Veracruz. The transition should show that the discussion is shifting to a different place.

steps.title: Reject false relationships
steps.content: Choice A suggests a result, Choice B suggests a more specific restatement, and Choice C suggests an example. The second discovery is simply in another location. The answer is D.
